list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT pays AS __text, pays AS __value FROM indicateurs_liquidite ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Pays (proxy secteur bancaire)
list.name: country
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pays AS __text, pays AS __value FROM indicateurs_liquidite ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: WITH latest_model AS (SELECT model_version FROM predictions_liquidite WHERE pays = ${country:singlequote} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT prediction_date AS time, yhat AS value, 'Prediction'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, yhat_lower_80 AS value, 'IC80_bas'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, yhat_upper_80 AS value, 'IC80_haut'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, yhat_lower_95 AS value, 'IC95_bas'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, yhat_upper_95 AS value, 'IC95_haut'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Prediction Prophet J+30 avec intervalles de confiance

targets.rawSql: WITH latest_model AS (SELECT model_version FROM predictions_liquidite WHERE pays = ${country:singlequote} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT prediction_date AS time, trend AS value, 'Tendance'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, monthly AS value, 'Saisonnalite mensuelle'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 UNION ALL SELECT prediction_date AS time, yearly AS value, 'Saisonnalite annuelle'::text AS metric FROM predictions_liquidite p JOIN latest_model m ON p.model_version = m.model_version WHERE p.pays = ${country:singlequote} AND p.horizon_days BETWEEN 1 AND 30 ORDER BY time;

WITH latest_ratio AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (pays) pays, ratio_liquidite FROM indicateurs_liquidite ORDER BY pays, date DESC), latest_pred7 AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (pays) pays, yhat FROM predictions_liquidite WHERE horizon_days = 7 ORDER BY pays, created_at DESC), joined AS (SELECT r.pays, r.ratio_liquidite AS ratio_actuel, p.yhat AS ratio_prevu_j7 FROM latest_ratio r LEFT JOIN latest_pred7 p ON r.pays = p.pays) SELECT pays AS "Pays (proxy secteur bancaire)", ratio_actuel, ratio_prevu_j7, CASE WHEN ratio_prevu_j7 IS NULL OR ratio_actuel = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((ratio_prevu_j7 - ratio_actuel) / ratio_actuel) * 100 END AS variation_pct, CASE WHEN ratio_prevu_j7 < 75 THEN 'CRITIQUE' WHEN ratio_prevu_j7 < 80 THEN 'SURVEILLANCE' ELSE 'OK' END AS statut FROM joined ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Tableau comparatif UEMOA (proxy secteur bancaire) - actuel vs J+7

options.content: Version actuelle : donnees publiques BCEAO/Banque Mondiale agregees au niveau national - proxy du comportement moyen du secteur bancaire de chaque pays UEMOA. Version bank-level : necessite acces aux donnees internes ALM/Tresorerie/Core Banking d'une banque commerciale.
